name: domain-teams
description: Domain-expert team skills (planning/code/design/research/copywriting) with quality-gate checkpoints.

interface.shortDescription: Domain-expert team skills (code/design/research/docs/QA…) with quality-gate checkpoints
interface.longDescription: Use domain-teams to run work through a specialist team — planning, code, design, devops, docs, research, copywriting, investing, qa, or skill. Each team pairs a worker (produces artifacts) with an evaluator (produces verdicts), enforcing four-tier SELF / MUST / SHOULD / MAY quality gates so a deliverable is reviewed before it hands off. Composes with sibling toolkits via cross-plugin delegation.
defaultPrompt: Have the planning team draft a product spec.
Run the code team on this feature.
Get the research team to investigate this question.
